title: HOZELOCK - Watering Nozzle 3-in-1, Ergonomic Soft Grip Handle, Non-slip, 3 Jets, 1 New Shower Jet for Gentle Watering [100-100-224], Yellow
description: From the manufacturer 3 IN 1 NOZZLE PLUS STD Compact and adjustable hose nozzle with 3 spray patterns. 3 IN 1 NOZZLE PLUS STD 3 in 1 Nozzle – Offers versatility and allows users to adapt their watering style to suit the task at hand. 3 Spray Patterns – Perfect for Rinsing, Cleaning and Fine Watering; the 3-in-1 nozzle has soft-touch grips making it more comfortable to use. Key benefits include: 3 adjustable spray patterns to suit the task at hand. Wide Cone spray, Powerful Jet spray, and a NEW Fine Rose spray for delicate watering. Ergonomic design with soft-touch grips. Twist to Use Twist to choose your preferred spray pattern. The nozzle includes instruction arrows offering clear guidance for use. Quick-Connect The Hozelock 3-in-1 Nozzle comes with a quick-connect male connector for fast changing between devices, a secure drip-free attachment.
